query: heavy 35mm film grain noise texture analog photography
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: heavy 35mm grain, noise textures, gritty analog

response.objective_caption: A nearly entirely black frame containing a single small red point of light positioned slightly left of center, with no other discernible subjects, objects, or environmental features visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nearly entirely black frame containing a single small red point of light positioned slightly left of center, with no other discernible subjects, objects, or environmental features visible. The image is overwhelmingly underexposed to the point of near-total darkness, rendering all detail absent and leaving only crushing blackness with a faint trace of noise and one isolated red speck.
